hypothesis: Increasing learning_rate_init from 1e-4 to 3e-4 will allow the (500, 300, 100) MLP to make larger gradient steps and reach a deeper minimum before early stopping triggers, addressing the apparent undertraining (training_loss still decreasing at final epoch, val_loss plateauing after only 9 epochs).
analysis_excerpt: The last experiment achieved balanced_accuracy=0.724 — well below the 0.78 baseline mentioned for the prior dataset. Sev
